featureName: BUG-029-004: ci.yml parallel publish path bypasses cosign / SBOM / SLSA / Trivy / digest pinning required by Build-Once Deploy-Many policy

executionHistory.notes: Discovery authored the BUG-029-004 packet for HL-RESCAN-011.
Design finalized the FROZEN DD-8 regression contract and DD-9 file-boundary contract.
Plan populated the single scope and remediated planning-side guard findings.
Implementation removed the parallel ci.yml publish path, added the internal/deploy static workflow contract test, and remediated validate-routed artifact blockers.
Test phase verified the new FROZEN contract tests, adversarial mutation coverage, and repo CLI Go unit surface.
Regression re-ran the new contract tests, existing build.yml canaries, regression-quality guard, and artifact lint.
Simplify found no safe reduction opportunity beyond the already-minimal source deletion and targeted contract test.
Stabilize verified the YAML-only regression tests across repeated iterations with zero flake detected.
Security posture strictly improves because ci.yml no longer publishes unsigned, unattested mutable tags; the new test is a read-only static YAML parser with no secret handling.
